MICROSOFT CORPORATION

FORM 10-K

INDEX

PART I
                Item 1.       Business                                             3
                Item 1A.      Risk Factors                                        16
PART II
                Item 7.       Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations 35
                Item 7A.      Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk
                Item 8.       Financial Statements and Supplementary Data

PART I

Item 1

The Microsoft Cloud provides integration across the technology stack while the company sells software, services, devices, and cloud infrastructure to commercial and consumer customers.

Research and Development

We invest in research and development across AI, cloud infrastructure, productivity software, and security.

PART I

Item 1A

Competition in cloud services, software platforms, devices, and AI infrastructure could reduce revenue growth, increase spending, and harm margins.

Operational and cybersecurity threats could disrupt products, services, customer trust, and regulatory compliance.

PART I

Item 1B

None.

PART II

Item 7

ITEM 7. MANAGEMENT' S DISCUSSION AND ANALYSIS OF FINANCIAL CONDITION AND RESULTS OF OPERATIONS

Revenue increased due to cloud services growth, higher usage, and enterprise demand. Operating expenses increased due to cloud and AI infrastructure investment.

PART II

Item 7A

Market risk disclosure begins here.

PART II

Item 8

ITEM 8. FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AND SUPPLEMENTARY DATA

Consolidated statements and accompanying notes begin here.

Notes to Consolidated Financial Statements

Note 1. Accounting Policies

Revenue is recognized when control of promised goods or services transfers to customers.

PART II

Item 9

Changes in and disagreements with accountants begin here.
